title: Calendar Cell CSS Class
description: Defines the type for specifying CSS classes for calendar cells, allowing custom styling of individual date cells.

sections.title: Type Definition
sections.description: CSS class via string, map, or predicate.

data.content: type AXCalendarCellCssClass = string | { [key: string]: boolean } | ((date: Date) => string);

props.name: string
props.description: A string containing CSS class names separated by spaces to apply to calendar cells.

props.name: object
props.description: An object where keys are CSS class names and values are booleans indicating whether the class should be applied.

props.name: function
props.description: A function that takes a Date parameter and returns a string of CSS class names to apply to that specific date cell.
